description: Register a dagster-chroma ChromaResource for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

host.label: Host
host.description: Chroma server host for HTTP client mode, e.g. 'localhost'

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Chroma API key

local_path.label: Local Path
local_path.description: Local path for persistent client mode (omit host/port for local)
